description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a capacity of 300 ml, featuring a pull tab on top. The can is wrapped in a bold, graphic label that uses a split color scheme of deep red and blue, separated by dynamic diagonal lines and dotted patterns. The label displays a stylized, high-contrast portrait of a person in dark blue and red tones, with large, blocky white text across the front. Nutritional information and recycling symbols are printed on the back, along with a QR code and additional product details. The surface of the can appears smooth and metallic, with no visible condensation or wetness. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments.
description: A 300 ml aluminum beer can with a bold red and blue graphic label, featuring a stylized portrait and large white text, finished with a smooth metallic surface.
description_view_0: The can displays the left side of the label, showing part of the stylized portrait in blue and the start of the large white text, with blue and red graphic elements.
description_view_1: This view centers on the front of the can, highlighting the full stylized portrait and the main white text on a red background.
description_view_2: The back of the can is visible, showing nutritional facts, a QR code, recycling symbols, and product information on a red and blue background.
description_view_3: The right side of the can is shown, with the continuation of the white text and more of the blue dotted pattern, as well as part of the portrait.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a split red and blue background with dotted patterns, a stylized portrait in dark tones, and large, bold white text. The design is modern and graphic, with clear, high-contrast elements and a dynamic layout.
